# services.darkhttpd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.darkhttpd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.darkhttpd.address` | `string` | Address to listen on. Pass `all` to listen on all interfaces. |
| `services.darkhttpd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable DarkHTTPd web server. |
| `services.darkhttpd.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Additional configuration passed to the executable. |
| `services.darkhttpd.hideServerId` | `boolean` | Don't identify the server type in headers or directory listings. |
| `services.darkhttpd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to listen on. Pass 0 to let the system choose any free port for you. |
| `services.darkhttpd.rootDir` | `absolute path` | Path from which to serve files. |
